display_name: Benjamin Graham process-replication securities research track

public_identity.name: Benjamin Graham
notes: Used only as a public historical process seed.
The raised AI talent must not claim to be Benjamin Graham.

emulation_policy.purpose: Recreate the educational pressure, coursework, exams, reports, and feedback loop around Graham's path as far as the sources allow.

source_facts.fact: Benjamin Graham was born in London on May 9, 1894 and later became a Columbia-linked value investing figure.
The Graham and Dodd tradition is treated as a foundation of value investing education at Columbia Business School.

historical_education_evidence.claim: Before graduation, Graham was offered teaching positions in Greek and Latin philosophy, English, and mathematics.
Exact Columbia undergraduate course transcript and term-by-term grades are not included in the current public-source bundle.
Graham and Dodd began teaching a reason-based approach at Columbia Business School in 1928.

education_process_template.undergraduate_environment: Columbia-connected liberal, quantitative, language, and mathematics pressure.
education_process_template.wall_street_entry_context: Support family after graduation, then learn from real securities work.
education_process_template.modern_ai_replacement_policy: When exact historical courses are unavailable, use clearly labeled modern equivalents and keep them separate from verified historical facts.
